title: IIT Madras Project Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
organization: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras)
short_info: Indian Institute of Technology Madras (IIT Madras) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 8 Project Engineer Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for research jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.
age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.details: Project Engineer: 4 Year Undergraduate degree in Electronics/Electrical Engineering/ MSc in Applied Physics with 2-3 years of experience in Industry or in an equivalent R&D lab.

salary_details.details: Rs. 45,000/- to Rs. 75,000/- per month (commensurate with qualifications and experience) (5% increment every year)

selection_process: Short-listing based on online applications Test/Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Madras Project Engineer Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 03-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Madras to complete the application.
